case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. JEWEL KING et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT KING, JEWEL DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
